Journal.Title: Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society. IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society. Annual International Conference
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Annu Int Conf IEEE Eng Med Biol Soc

Article.ArticleTitle: Contrastive Structural Distillation Based Three-Dimensional Resolution Enhancement for Magnetic Particle Imaging.

Abstract.AbstractText: Magnetic Particle Imaging (MPI) is a novel imaging technique for visualizing the spatial distribution of magnetic nanoparticles. Due to variations in gradient field strength or the use of a single scanning trajectory, MPI image resolution exhibits anisotropy. This paper introduces CSDNet, a model based on structural distillation with contrast learning. It extracts low-resolution directional features from a two-dimensional isotropic teacher network to guide the training of a student network and enhances three-dimensional resolution through deblurring. The introduced contrastive loss effectively facilitates knowledge transfer. Furthermore, perceptual loss further improves network performance through feature map matching. Experimental results demonstrate that CSDNet outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of detail recovery and accuracy at varying noise levels.Clinical RelevanceThis establishes a deep learning method designed to achieve isotropic resolution for three-dimensional scanning, which accurately describes the three-dimensional magnetic particle concentration distribution and provide an imaging foundation for clinical applications.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Annu Int Conf IEEE Eng Med Biol Soc
